sadhanaContent.introBody: A simple practice to calm your mind and feel your body.
sadhanaContent.step1: Sit comfortably with your back straight
sadhanaContent.step2: Put one hand on your belly
sadhanaContent.step3: Breathe deep, feel your hand rise and fall
sadhanaContent.hintInhale: Fill your belly with air, like a balloon
sadhanaContent.hintExhale: Let the air out very slowly
sadhanaContent.doneBody: Your mind and body feel a little more peaceful.

philosophyContent.introBody: One of the biggest questions in the universe. Let's explore it together.

name.title: Are you your name?
name.body: If you change your name tomorrow, are you still you?

body.title: Are you your body?
body.body: Your body changes every year. As a baby you were very different. Are you still the same?

feelings.title: Are you your feelings?
feelings.body: Sometimes you're happy, sometimes sad. Are you a different person when they change?

thoughts.title: Are you your thoughts?
thoughts.body: Your ideas change all the time. If your thoughts change, are you still you?

philosophyContent.reflectionQuote: There is something in you that is always you, no matter what changes.
philosophyContent.reflectionBody: Philosophers have been asking this question for thousands of years. There's no right answer. What matters is to keep asking.
